emails.subject: FW: EGM books
emails.body: FW: EGM books EGM has the largest number of trading books in the company with over 500 active books and despite this you guys do the best job getting worldwide information to us in a timely and accurate fashion. (I wish I could get the rest of the company to this point). I'm told that the people referenced below have contributed in a big way to this effort. Thanks for the effort. Rick To: Buy, Rick

emails.subject: Re: FW: EGM books
emails.body: Re: FW: EGM books Thanks. Its nice to hear a kind word every once in a while. Its been a tough quarter. Im glad we are making progress in this area, it is a priority. Mike
